bio.extra_names: EH 1909 spells maiden surname 'Crittenden'; FamilySearch gives 'Cruttenden' (KZSD-2DZ) — FS preferred
EH 1909 spells maiden surname 'Crittenden'; FamilySearch gives 'Cruttenden' (KZSD-2DZ) — FS preferred

narrative_blocks.header: Married at twenty-two had thirteen children
narrative_blocks.body: Reuben Norton Jr. married Lois Cruttenden of East Guilford about 1770 — when he was twenty-two and she was twelve. The age gap implies the marriage date is an approximation; the real wedding likely came years later. They had at least thirteen children documented across EH and FamilySearch.

narrative_blocks.header: Married a widower in her late thirties
narrative_blocks.body: Hannah Norton was approximately thirty-eight when she married Martin Blatchley as his second wife on July 8, 1813. They had three children, eldest born 1816. She outlived Martin by six months — he died November 3, 1847 and she followed May 14, 1848.

parents.father_research_notes: Aaron Blatchley of Guilford CT. Per EH 1909 entry 1065.
parents.mother_research_notes: Prudence Graves Blatchley of Guilford CT. Per EH 1909 entry 1065.

narrative_blocks.header: Died at thirty-seven leaving three children
narrative_blocks.body: Hulbert Norton died March 11, 1823 in Guilford at thirty-seven, leaving Laura Dudley with three children — the youngest, Maria, was not yet two. Laura never remarried and lived another thirty-eight years to 1861.

bio.extra_names: FamilySearch records middle name 'Chloe' (KCMM-F2M); EH does not give middle name

parents.father_research_notes: Nathaniel Dudley of Killingworth CT. Per EH 1909 entry 1069.
parents.mother_research_notes: Chloe Dowd Dudley of Killingworth CT. Per EH 1909 entry 1069.

narrative_blocks.body: Leah Norton was forty-seven when her husband Alexander McQuillan died November 4, 1839 in Guilford. She never remarried and lived another forty-seven years, dying at Guilford January 19, 1886 at age ninety-three.

bio.extra_names: EH spells 'McQuillan'; FamilySearch records 'Alex McQuillin' (K635-LM7); EH spelling preferred

narrative_blocks.header: Fathered fourteen children with two wives
narrative_blocks.body: Hebron Norton had fourteen children across two marriages — first to Susan Truman, then to a woman named only Julia in Edward Hooker's record. None of the fourteen are individually named in the 1909 source. FamilySearch's implausible 1900 death date would put him at 105-106 and is likely an error.
